signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Sees Heavy Volume | NO whale bets confirmed | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Sees Heavy Volume | NO whale bets confirmed | MED confidence**  
Traders on X are buzzing about "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?" at 88% odds for 300-319 tweets ($13M volume), viewed as a mispriced niche bet by some due to Musk's posting patterns, but no specific smart money moves or tips trending[3][4].
